visa_types.name: Maid Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Download the checklist. 
Note: Please print this checklist and bring it with you for your visa submission.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > sau > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in SAR is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of SAR 315.00 (VAT Included) per application over and above visa fees. 
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.
visa_types.processing_time: The application process may take approximately 3–4 working weeks; however, this timeframe may be subject to extension based on the workload of the concerned authorities and official holidays.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
All submitted documents must be current and complete. The incompleteness of the documents submitted for the visa application in Turkey may cause the application to be rejected. Embassy of Turkey in KSA has the right to request additional documents when it deems necessary. Presenting of the above documents does not guarantee that the visa will be granted. There is no refund possibility in any circumstances. All forms and documents must be prepared and presented separately for each person (including family members or any group).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
All submitted documents must be current and complete. The incompleteness of the documents submitted for the visa application in Turkey may cause the application to be rejected. Embassy of Turkey in KSA has the right to request additional documents when it deems necessary. Presenting of the above documents does not guarantee that the visa will be granted. There is no refund possibility in any circumstances. All forms and documents must be prepared and presented separately for each person (including family members or any group).

## Visa Fees

[tur > sau > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in SAR is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of SAR 315.00 (VAT Included) per application over and above visa fees. 
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist. 
Note: Please print this checklist and bring it with you for your visa submission.

## Photo Specifications
You may have the biometric photographs required for your application taken at any of our offices.

## Processing Time
The application process may take approximately 3–4 working weeks; however, this timeframe may be subject to extension based on the workload of the concerned authorities and official holidays. 

## Application Form
Application forms must be completed digitally and signed. Applicants are encouraged to bring the completed form when visiting the center. One color copy must be printed for each application. Do not paste a personal photo on the form.
Visa Application Form

There is no refund possibility in any circumstances. All forms and documents must be prepared and presented separately for each person (including family members or any group).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
All submitted documents must be current and complete. The incompleteness of the documents submitted for the visa application in Turkey may cause the application to be rejected. Embassy of Turkey in KSA has the right to request additional documents when it deems necessary. Presenting of the above documents does not guarantee that the visa will be granted. There is no refund possibility in any circumstances. All forms and documents must be prepared and presented separately for each person (including family members or any group).

## Visa Fees

[tur > sau > en > Table:Business Visa > Visa Fees 1]
Please Note:
- The applicable visa fee in SAR is as per current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of SAR 315.00 (VAT Included) per application over and above visa fees. 
- Visa Fee may vary by Nationality and Purpose.
- All fees are non-refundable.

## Documents Required
Download the checklist. 
Note: Please print this checklist and bring it with you for your visa submission.

## Photo Specifications
You may have the biometric photographs required for your application taken at any of our offices.

## Processing Time
The application process may take approximately 3–4 working weeks; however, this timeframe may be subject to extension based on the workload of the concerned authorities and official holidays. 

## Application Form
Application forms must be completed digitally and signed. Applicants are encouraged to bring the completed form when visiting the center. One color copy must be printed for each application. Do not paste a personal photo on the form.
Visa Application Form
